steps.title: Match the hard-work claim
steps.content: The claim says John is a hard worker fully dedicated to his job as water carrier. The supporting quotation should show sustained effort or devotion to the work, not merely payment, rules, or possessions.

steps.title: Reject indirect details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on money and happiness after work. Choice B describes a rule the city water carrier learns, and Choice D describes what John did with worn-out jugs. The best support shows him working from early morning to late afternoon and moving constantly from place to place. The answer is C.
